title: lygodium japonicum var. microstachyum
intro: Lygodium japonicum var. microstachyum, also known as the Japanese climbing fern, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Lygodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Lygodium japonicum var. microstachyum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic use.
